SEARCH
程序包 AccountType

类 AccountBillInfo

java.lang.Object
AccountType.AccountBillInfo
public class AccountBillInfo extends Object
use to kill an object and remove it from the filesystem

  • 构造器详细资料

    • AccountBillInfo

      public AccountBillInfo()

  • 方法详细资料

    • parseFinancialLogs

      public static void parseFinancialLogs(String email, String accountNumber)
      Parse the log file and generate a corresponding statistical array
      参数:
      email - the email
      accountNumber - the account number

    • readArrayFromFile

      public static double[][][] readArrayFromFile(String path) throws IOException
      Reads a three-dimensional array from a file. This method reads a three-dimensional array of double values from a specified file path.
      参数:
      path - the path of the file to read.
      返回:
      a three-dimensional array of double values.
      抛出:
      IOException - if there is an input/output error during file reading.

    • printArray

      public static void printArray(double[][][] array)
      Prints the contents of a three-dimensional array. Each value is printed space-separated, with each two-dimensional array separated by a newline.
      参数:
      array - the three-dimensional array to print.

    • printArray2D

      public static void printArray2D(double[][] array)
      Prints the contents of a two-dimensional array. Each value is printed space-separated, with each one-dimensional array on a new line.
      参数:
      array - the two-dimensional array to print.

    • createFakeArrayFromFile

      public static double[][][] createFakeArrayFromFile() throws IOException
      Creates and returns a fake three-dimensional array. This method simulates reading from a file by generating random double values for a 5x6x12 array.
      返回:
      a three-dimensional array filled with random double values.
      抛出:
      IOException - if an input/output error is supposed to simulate.

    • readLogsForMonth

      public static String[] readLogsForMonth(int year, int month, String filePath)
      Reads log entries for a specific month from a file. This method filters log entries by month and year from a specified file and returns them sorted by date.
      参数:
      year - the year of the logs to read.
      month - the month of the logs to read.
      filePath - the path of the log file.
      返回:
      an array of log entries for the specified month and year.

    • logTransfer

      public static String[] logTransfer(String[] monthLog)
      Transforms log entries into a readable string format. This method formats each log entry into a more readable form, specifically tailored for display.
      参数:
      monthLog - an array of log entries to format.
      返回:
      an array of formatted log entries.

    • createLogMatrix

      public static double[][] createLogMatrix(String[] logs)
      Creates a matrix from log entries. This method processes an array of log entries to create a matrix representing different financial transactions over the days of a month.
      参数:
      logs - the array of log entries.
      返回:
      a two-dimensional array where each cell represents a specific day and transaction type total.

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      The main entry point for the application. This method is used to execute the program, demonstrating file reading, log processing, and array handling.
      参数:
      args - command-line arguments passed to the application.
